name: build-product
title: Build Product
summary: Turn a validated idea into a complete, verified, shippable digital product to a top-tier bar.
description: A reasoning skill that plans and sequences a buildable deliverable (workbook, app, playbook, listing kit), insisting every artifact is verified rather than assumed, with empty-state guards and to-the-cent reconciliation.
author: Warden Curated Pack

task.description: What to build, e.g. 'a budgeting workbook for freelancers'.
